title: Red Zinger Mini Classic 1989 boys 13 Morgul Bismark

transcript.text: Well, good morning. This is June the 22nd, Thursday morning. We're here at the Morgul Bismarck for the stage today. It's cool and sunny, partly cloudy, and a really beautiful day.
We had quite a bit of rain yesterday, and it was a rest day, and we have a light night, and come back up to this finish line.
Did Mike wear his race leader jersey to Grisanti's?
No, he didn't have a race leader's jersey at that point. He won the race, but he's still second place.
Just keep filming that group in front of that truck.
I'm pretty sure that's them. There's a purple jersey taking a lead, sprinting.
Yeah, so if his is the third race, then he'll catch any numbers.
